text.title: django-models Output Contract
text.summary: JSON schema for a Django models spec.

forbidden.pattern: a model with extends == "models.Model" (must extend BaseModel/SoftDeletableModel)
a foreign_key with on_delete == "CASCADE" referencing a user/account model AND reason < 20 chars
a field with db_index=true and db_index_reason missing or shorter than 10 chars
a model with is_pii=true AND soft_delete=true (PII must be hard-deletable)
a partial index condition declared while db_engine != "postgresql"
